message:
Fix IVF search to use partition-organized vectors file

- Replace scattered row fetching with partition-organized ivf_vectors.bin
- New file format stores vectors by partition for contiguous reads
- Search now downloads ~100MB instead of 1.3GB for 20 partitions
- Fix string column reading to handle Lance offset encoding correctly
  (offset[N] is end of string N, start is offset[N-1] or 0)
- Support multi-page string columns for datasets with >100K rows
